complianceNotice: UltraTorrent does not scrape IMDb web pages. IMDb support uses user-provided IMDb datasets or licensed IMDb API access.

page.title: IMDb Provider
page.subtitle: Configure IMDb metadata from user-provided datasets or a licensed IMDb API.
page.noAccessBody: You do not have permission to view the IMDb provider.
page.error: Could not load IMDb provider settings.

status.title: Provider status
status.description: Current IMDb provider health and last dataset import.

dataset.title: Dataset configuration
dataset.description: Point to a directory holding the official IMDb TSV dataset files (.tsv.gz).
dataset.dirHelp: Where dataset files live and are downloaded to. Leave blank to use a managed default under your storage root.
dataset.stopRequestedBody: The import will halt after the current batch; records already imported are kept.
dataset.autoDesc: On a schedule, download the latest IMDb dataset files and import them automatically.
dataset.baseUrlHelp: Where the .tsv.gz files are fetched from. Defaults to the official IMDb datasets; point at a mirror if you host one.
dataset.intervalHelp: How often to refresh. IMDb updates daily; 168 = weekly.
dataset.updateAlreadyRunning: A dataset download/import is already running.
dataset.updateNowStartedBody: Downloading the IMDb datasets, then importing. Progress shows above.
dataset.updateNowFailedTitle: Could not start the dataset update
dataset.historyEmptyBody: Validate and import a dataset to populate IMDb metadata.

api.title: Official / licensed API
api.description: Optional licensed IMDb REST API used for search and lookups. Never contacts imdb.com.
api.configuredUnavailableBody: Check the base URL and key.
api.notConfiguredBody: Set a base URL and API key first.

matching.title: Matching preferences
matching.description: Tune how IMDb search ranks and filters candidate titles.
matching.minVotesHint: Higher thresholds weight confidence toward well-known titles.

optimized.title: Import strategy
optimized.description: Import a lean, production-ready IMDb subset tuned for movie acquisition and matching — instead of every dataset.
optimized.skippedWarning: Intentionally skipped: {{files}}. These are very large (Principals is ~90M rows) and aren't needed for movie acquisition, matching, or ranking.
optimized.minYearHint: Titles released before this year are skipped. Defaults to 1970 (env IMDB_MIN_YEAR).
optimized.resetConfirm: This deletes all imported IMDb data and reimports from scratch. Continue?
optimized.resetDone: IMDb data reset ({{count}} titles cleared); reimport started.
